subject: Appointment confirmed — Cardiology follow-up
snippet: Your cardiology follow-up is confirmed for July 31 at 3:30 PM.
bodyText: Dear Patient, Your cardiology follow-up appointment is confirmed for July 31, 2026 at 3:30 PM at City Medical Center, Suite 410. Please arrive 15 minutes early. If you need to reschedule, please call 555-0100.

subject: Flight delayed — need airport pickup at 3:45 PM July 31
snippet: My flight got delayed. I'll land at 3:45 PM on July 31, can someone pick me up?
bodyText: Hey, my flight AA1234 has been delayed. I'll now be arriving at O'Hare Terminal 3 at 3:45 PM on July 31, 2026. Could someone pick me up around 4:00-4:15 PM? Text me when you're on the way. Thanks!

extractedEvent.title: Airport pickup — Alex Johnson
extractedEvent.description: Pick up Alex Johnson, flight AA1234

subject: School pickup reminder — early dismissal August 1
snippet: Reminder: Early dismissal on August 1 at 1:00 PM. Please arrange pickup.
bodyText: Dear Parent/Guardian, This is a reminder that Lincoln Elementary School will have an early dismissal on Friday, August 1, 2026 at 1:00 PM due to staff professional development. Please arrange pickup for your child by 1:15 PM. Thank you.

subject: Soccer practice schedule — August 2
snippet: Soccer practice this Sunday August 2 from 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM at Riverside Park.
bodyText: Hi team! Just a reminder that soccer practice is this Sunday, August 2, 2026 from 10:00 AM to 11:30 AM at Riverside Park, Field 3. Please bring water and shin guards. See you there!

subject: Dental appointment confirmation — August 3 at 9:00 AM
snippet: Your dental cleaning appointment is confirmed for Monday August 3 at 9:00 AM.
bodyText: Dear Patient, Your routine dental cleaning appointment is confirmed for Monday, August 3, 2026 at 9:00 AM at Bright Smiles Dental, 200 Oak Street. The appointment will last approximately 1 hour. Please arrive 5 minutes early to complete any paperwork.

subject: Prescription ready for pickup
snippet: Your prescription is ready for pickup at CVS on Main Street.
bodyText: Your prescription (Amoxicillin 500mg, Qty 30) is ready for pickup at CVS Pharmacy, 450 Main Street. This prescription will be held for 7 days. Pickup hours are Mon-Fri 8 AM - 9 PM. No appointment needed.

subject: Piano lesson this Monday August 4 at 4:00 PM
snippet: Your weekly piano lesson is scheduled for Monday August 4 at 4:00 PM.
bodyText: Hi! Just confirming your weekly piano lesson for this Monday, August 4, 2026 at 4:00 PM at Melody Music Academy, Studio B. The session will run for 45 minutes. Please bring your lesson book and practice materials.

extractedEvent.title: Piano lesson
extractedEvent.description: Bring lesson book and practice materials

subject: Parent-Teacher Conference — August 4 at 5:30 PM
snippet: Your parent-teacher conference with Mrs. Thompson is scheduled for August 4 at 5:30 PM.
bodyText: Dear Parent/Guardian, Your parent-teacher conference with Mrs. Thompson is scheduled for Tuesday, August 4, 2026 at 5:30 PM in Room 12 at Lincoln Elementary School. The meeting will last approximately 20 minutes. If you need to reschedule, please contact the main office.

subject: Your grocery delivery is scheduled for July 30 between 2:00-4:00 PM
snippet: Your Instacart grocery delivery is scheduled for Thursday July 30, 2:00-4:00 PM.
bodyText: Your Instacart grocery delivery is scheduled for Thursday, July 30, 2026 between 2:00 PM and 4:00 PM. Please ensure someone is home to receive the delivery. You'll receive a text when your shopper is on the way.

extractedEvent.title: Grocery delivery window
extractedEvent.description: Instacart delivery, someone must be home

subject: Dinner reservation confirmed — July 31 at 7:00 PM
snippet: Your dinner reservation for 4 guests is confirmed for Saturday July 31 at 7:00 PM.
bodyText: Dear Guest, Your dinner reservation for 4 guests is confirmed for Saturday, July 31, 2026 at 7:00 PM at Bella Italia Restaurant, 320 Elm Avenue. Please note that we hold reservations for 15 minutes past the reserved time. We look forward to seeing you!
